title: ArtifactSpec
description: Canonical schema for AI-generated binary/text artifacts in the Nintendoor64 Sonia pipeline. All AI outputs must conform to this contract before reaching file I/O.

id.description: Unique identifier for this artifact (UUID or hash-based)

kind.description: Classification of artifact content and intended use

encoding.description: How the payload bytes are represented in JSON

payload_ref.description: Path reference to actual payload file (relative to artifacts/ dir)

metadata.description: Optional contextual metadata for AI conditioning

segment.description: ROM segment or memory region this artifact affects

invariants_checked.description: List of invariant rule IDs this artifact has been validated against

checksum.description: SHA-256 hex digest of payload for integrity verification

ArtifactType.description: Known artifact classifications for routing and validation

EncodingMode.description: Payload encoding strategy for JSON transport
